meta_title: For Founders: testing automation to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Testing Automation to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop searching for startup ideas. Use testing automation to validate market gaps instantly. A high-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for founders.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. Use testing automation to scrape market forums, identify recurring pain points, and auto-generate MVP specs. By automating the discovery of 'unsolved problems' via Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform technical validation into a repeatable revenue engine rather than relying on guesswork.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the startup founder’s greatest enemy. You are staring at a cursor, waiting for a 'unique' idea, while your competitors are already shipping iterations. The truth is, ideas don't come from thin air; they come from the friction of existing, poorly solved workflows.

To break the cycle, you must stop being a creator and start being a detective. By leveraging automated testing and discovery scripts, you can pull raw data from the market, validate the depth of a user's pain, and architect a solution before the competition even finishes their morning coffee.

steps.title: Define the Market Scraper
steps.description: Identify target subreddits or forums where your ideal customers complain. We will build a scraper to aggregate these pain points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust scraping script that monitors specific subreddits for keywords like 'how do I', 'is there a tool for', and 'struggling with' to identify market gaps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'initialize scraper project using playwright'

steps.title: Automate Pain Point Analysis
steps.description: Feed the raw text into an LLM pipeline to categorize recurring problems by frequency and potential willingness to pay.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build an analysis engine that takes raw text from the scraper, filters for high-intent requests, and ranks them by monetization potential.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file analyzer.py --prompt 'implement sentiment analysis to flag urgent user complaints'

steps.title: Generate Functional MVP Specs
steps.description: Transform the validated pain points into technical requirements and core feature lists.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a generator that converts categorized pain points into a structured JSON file containing feature lists, user stories, and tech stack recommendations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate product_spec.json based on current analyzer output'

steps.title: Automate Unit Testing for MVP
steps.description: Ensure your MVP foundation is rock solid before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for a SaaS boilerplate that covers authentication, database connections, and API endpoints.

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor Feedback Loop
steps.description: Connect your testing suite to a deployment pipeline that triggers automated health checks upon every new feature push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline script that integrates automated testing results with a Slack webhook to notify the team of deployment status.

pro_tips: Focus on 'hair-on-fire' problems: Only automate the discovery of problems where users explicitly mention paying for a solution.
Don't build the whole app: Use Claude Code to build a 'Wizard of Oz' MVP—a landing page that looks functional but handles logic manually behind the scenes.
Data hygiene is key: Filter out bots and promotional spam from your scraper early to avoid wasting cycles on fake pain points.
Test for churn risks: Write your automated tests to simulate common user failure paths, not just successful ones.
Iterate on the prompt, not the code: Spend 80% of your time refining the Antigravity prompts to get higher quality market insights.
content.next_steps: Once your scraper identifies a high-potential idea, spend exactly 48 hours building the landing page. If you don't get 10 signups, pivot the filter criteria in your Antigravity prompt and run the cycle again.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing what the market wants and start building what they are begging for. Join our community of high-velocity founders to scale your development speed today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
